title: callista hasseltii
intro: Callista hasseltii, also known as the Butterfly Pea, is a flowering plant native to tropical Asia, belonging to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral activities, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The health benefits of Callista hasseltii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. Callista hasseltii can be prepared as a herbal tea, or used in supplement form, and is also used as a natural food coloring due to its vibrant blue color.
